case_title: UNIVERSAL PARAGON CORPORATION VS. JUDY HUGHES et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNIVERSAL PARAGON CORPORATION ON DEFENDANT HUGHES, JUDY
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HUGHES, JUDY
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT HUGHES, JUDY

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNIVERSAL PARAGON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT HUGHES, JUDY DOES 1 TO 5 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
